news.title: Aegis Vopak, a logistics firm, trades over 9% higher.
news.summary: Aegis Vopak, a logistics firm, trades over 9% higher.

news.title:
Aegis Vopak Terminals executes SPA for 75% equity transfer.
Company holds 75% stake in Hindustan Aegis LPG Ltd post deal.
news.summary:
Aegis Vopak Terminals executes SPA for 75% equity transfer.
Company holds 75% stake in Hindustan Aegis LPG Ltd post deal.

news.title:
Aegis Vopak announced the retirement of VP HR & Admin, Mr. Girish Gurkhe, effective February 5, 2026.
Details of the announcement as per SEBI regulations are available on the company's website.
news.summary:
Aegis Vopak announced the retirement of VP HR & Admin, Mr. Girish Gurkhe, effective February 5, 2026.
Details of the announcement as per SEBI regulations are available on the company's website.

news.title:
Aegis Vopak signs agreement with Sea Lord Containers for LPG infrastructure at New Mangalore Port.
Company to pay INR 52.5 crore; asset transfer post project completion.
news.summary:
Aegis Vopak signs agreement with Sea Lord Containers for LPG infrastructure at New Mangalore Port.
Company to pay INR 52.5 crore; asset transfer post project completion.

news.title:
Aegis Vopak Terminals' Q3 net profit surged to ₹615M from ₹378M YoY.
Revenue grew to ₹1.97B in Q3, up from ₹1.6B YoY.
news.summary:
Aegis Vopak Terminals' Q3 net profit surged to ₹615M from ₹378M YoY.
Revenue grew to ₹1.97B in Q3, up from ₹1.6B YoY.

news.title:
Aegis Vopak Terminals to issue 1,03,000 NCDs worth ₹1,030 Cr via private placement.
Debentures mature in 3 years with a 7.4% annual interest rate.
news.summary:
Aegis Vopak Terminals to issue 1,03,000 NCDs worth ₹1,030 Cr via private placement.
Debentures mature in 3 years with a 7.4% annual interest rate.

news.title:
Aegis Vopak Terminals to issue NCDs worth ₹1,030 cr with 7.2% interest.
The 3-year tenure debentures will be listed on NSE.
news.summary:
Aegis Vopak Terminals to issue NCDs worth ₹1,030 cr with 7.2% interest.
The 3-year tenure debentures will be listed on NSE.

news.title:
Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd's board meeting on Dec 4, 2025, to consider fund-raising via private NCD issuance.
Details available on www.aegisvopak.com; compliance under SEBI Listing Regulations shared.
news.summary:
Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd's board meeting on Dec 4, 2025, to consider fund-raising via private NCD issuance.
Details available on www.aegisvopak.com; compliance under SEBI Listing Regulations shared.

news.title: Aegis Vopak plans USD 1.2B capex by FY27 with 26.2% YoY revenue growth.
news.summary: Aegis Vopak plans USD 1.2B capex by FY27 with 26.2% YoY revenue growth.

news.title:
Aegis Vopak Terminals approves 66,000 NCDs issuance worth ₹660 crore.
Company's market capitalization stands at ₹30 billion.
news.summary:
Aegis Vopak Terminals approves 66,000 NCDs issuance worth ₹660 crore.
Company's market capitalization stands at ₹30 billion.

news.title:
Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd approved unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1, FY 2025 at its board meeting on Nov 6, 2025.
Standalone revenue for Q2 FY 2025 was ₹10,097.98 lakh, and consolidated revenue stood at ₹18,762.90 lakh.
news.summary:
Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd approved unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1, FY 2025 at its board meeting on Nov 6, 2025.
Standalone revenue for Q2 FY 2025 was ₹10,097.98 lakh, and consolidated revenue stood at ₹18,762.90 lakh.

news.title:
Aegis Vopak acquires Greenfield terminal with 77,286 MT LPG, 318,100 cbm liquid storage, and 35,000 MT LPG bottling plant.
The acquisition cost is INR 502.5 crore, payable upon agreement signing.
news.summary:
Aegis Vopak acquires Greenfield terminal with 77,286 MT LPG, 318,100 cbm liquid storage, and 35,000 MT LPG bottling plant.
The acquisition cost is INR 502.5 crore, payable upon agreement signing.

news.title:
Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd to acquire 96% stake in Aegis Terminals Pipavav Ltd (ATPL) for INR 10 per share.
ATPL, focused on storage of oil/chemicals, has no turnover yet and will become Aegis Vopak's subsidiary.
news.summary:
Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd to acquire 96% stake in Aegis Terminals Pipavav Ltd (ATPL) for INR 10 per share.
ATPL, focused on storage of oil/chemicals, has no turnover yet and will become Aegis Vopak's subsidiary.

news.title:
Aegis Vopak Terminals plans to raise ₹6.6B via NCDs to enhance finances.
The funds aim to strengthen capital expenditure and financial stability.
news.summary:
Aegis Vopak Terminals plans to raise ₹6.6B via NCDs to enhance finances.
The funds aim to strengthen capital expenditure and financial stability.

news.title:
Aegis Vopak appoints new Non-Executive Director as existing one resigns.
Plans to raise Rs 660 Cr via NCDs offering 6.92% interest, listed on NSE.
news.summary:
Aegis Vopak appoints new Non-Executive Director as existing one resigns.
Plans to raise Rs 660 Cr via NCDs offering 6.92% interest, listed on NSE.

news.title:
Aegis Vopak Terminals' board to discuss debenture fundraising on Oct 16.
Meeting aims to explore potential strategies for raising funds.
news.summary:
Aegis Vopak Terminals' board to discuss debenture fundraising on Oct 16.
Meeting aims to explore potential strategies for raising funds.

news.title:
Aegis Vopak's board to consider fund-raising via NCD issuance on Oct 16, 2025.
Trading window for insiders closed from Oct 1, 2025, until 48 hours post financial results.
news.summary:
Aegis Vopak's board to consider fund-raising via NCD issuance on Oct 16, 2025.
Trading window for insiders closed from Oct 1, 2025, until 48 hours post financial results.
